TSG1006: staging evaluation failed: q.language is not a function. (In 'q.language("sql", {
  expression(source) {
    return __typestageTag(0, q.expr)`query(${source})`;
  }
})', 'q.language' is undefined)
tests/fixtures/fail/language-extension-parser-plugin/input/main.ts:8:27 TSG1001: explicit splice 'source' does not resolve to a TypeStage code value
tests/fixtures/fail/language-extension-parser-plugin/input/main.ts:13:25 TSG1001: explicit splice 'sql.expr`select * from users where active = true`' does not resolve to a TypeStage code value
